title: Regex Filter Filter
description: Configuration for the Okapi Regex Filter Filter

configurations.name: SRT Sub-Titles
configurations.description: Configuration for SRT (Sub-Rip Text) sub-titles files.
configurations.parametersRaw: useLD.b=true localizeOutside.b=true startString=" endString=" extractOuterStrings.b=false useBSlashEscape.b=true oneLevelGroups.b=false regexOptions.i=40 mimeType=text/plain ruleCount.i=1 rule0.ruleName=Rule rule0.ruleType.i=1 rule0.expr=^(\d\d:\d\d:\d\d.*?)\n(.*?)(\n\n+|\z) rule0.groupSource.i=2 rule0.groupTarget.i=-1 rule0.groupName.i=-1 rule0.groupNote.i=1 rule0.preserveWS.b=true rule0.useCodeFinder.b=true rule0.sample=1$0a$00:00:20,000 --> 00:00:24,400 X1:100 X2:600 Y1:050 Y2:100$0a$text line 1$0a$line 2$0a$$0a$2$0a$00:00:24,600 --> 00:00:27,800$0a$Text entry 2$0a$ rule0.codeFinderRules.count.i=1 rule0.codeFinderRules.rule0=<\w+.*?>| rule0.codeFinderRules.sample=test bold, test rule0.codeFinderRules.useAllRulesWhenTesting.b=false

configurations.name: Text (Line=Paragraph)
configurations.description: Configuration for text files where each line is a text unit
configurations.parametersRaw:
useLD.b=true
localizeOutside.b=true
startString="
endString="
extractOuterStrings.b=false
useBSlashEscape.b=true
oneLevelGroups.b=false
regexOptions.i=8
mimeType=text/plain
ruleCount.i=1
rule0.ruleName=Para
rule0.ruleType.i=1
rule0.expr=(^(?=.+))(.*?)$
rule0.groupSource.i=2
rule0.groupTarget.i=-1
rule0.groupName.i=-1
rule0.groupNote.i=-1
rule0.preserveWS.b=true
rule0.useCodeFinder.b=false
rule0.sample=Text 1$0a$Text 2$0a$$0a$Text 3$0a$Text 4
rule0.codeFinderRules.count.i=0
rule0.codeFinderRules.sample=
rule0.codeFinderRules.useAllRulesWhenTesting.b=false

configurations.name: Text (Block=Paragraph)
configurations.description: Configuration for text files where text units are separated by 2 or more line-breaks.
configurations.parametersRaw:
useLD.b=true
localizeOutside.b=true
startString="
endString="
extractOuterStrings.b=false
useBSlashEscape.b=true
oneLevelGroups.b=false
regexOptions.i=40
mimeType=text/plain
ruleCount.i=1
rule0.ruleName=Para
rule0.ruleType.i=1
rule0.expr=(\n*)(.*?)(\n\n|\Z)
rule0.groupSource.i=2
rule0.groupTarget.i=-1
rule0.groupName.i=-1
rule0.groupNote.i=-1
rule0.preserveWS.b=false
rule0.useCodeFinder.b=false
rule0.sample=$0a$text 1$0a$$0a$$0a$text 2$0a$new line.$0a$$0a$text 3
rule0.codeFinderRules.count.i=0
rule0.codeFinderRules.sample=
rule0.codeFinderRules.useAllRulesWhenTesting.b=false

configurations.name: Text (Mac Strings)
configurations.parametersRaw:
#v1
useLd.b=true
localizeOutside.b=true
startString="
endString="
extractOuterStrings.b=false
useBSlashEscape.b=true
useDoubleCharEscape.b=false
removeBSlashEscape.b=true
oneLevelGroups.b=false
regexOptions.i=40
mimeType=text/plain
ruleCount.i=4
rule0.ruleName=Comments+String
rule0.ruleType.i=0
rule0.expr=/\*(.*?)\*/\n"(.*?)"\s*=(.*?(?<!\\)(?:\\{2})*");
rule0.groupSource.i=3
rule0.groupTarget.i=-1
rule0.groupName.i=2
rule0.groupNote.i=1
rule0.preserveWS.b=true
rule0.useCodeFinder.b=true
rule0.sample=/* Menu item to make the current document plain text */$0a$"Make Plain Text" = "Make Plain \"Text";$0a$/* Menu item to make the current document rich text */$0a$"Make Rich Text" = "Make Rich Text";$0a$
rule0.codeFinderRules.count.i=3
rule0.codeFinderRules.rule0=%(([-0+#]?)[-0+#]?)((\d\$)?)(([\d\*]*)(\.[\d\*]*)?)[dioxXucsfeEgGpn@]
rule0.codeFinderRules.rule1=(\\r\\n)|\\a|\\b|\\f|\\n|\\r|\\t|\\v
rule0.codeFinderRules.rule2=\<(/?)\w+[^>]*?>
rule0.codeFinderRules.sample=
rule0.codeFinderRules.useAllRulesWhenTesting.b=false
rule1.ruleName=Bracketing Comments
rule1.ruleType.i=3
rule1.expr=/\*(.*?)\*/
rule1.groupSource.i=1
rule1.groupTarget.i=-1
rule1.groupName.i=-1
rule1.groupNote.i=-1
rule1.preserveWS.b=true
rule1.useCodeFinder.b=false
rule1.sample=test /* test */
rule1.codeFinderRules.count.i=0
rule1.codeFinderRules.sample=
rule1.codeFinderRules.useAllRulesWhenTesting.b=false
rule2.ruleName=Line Comments
rule2.ruleType.i=3
rule2.expr=//(.*?)\n
rule2.groupSource.i=-1
rule2.groupTarget.i=-1
rule2.groupName.i=-1
rule2.groupNote.i=-1
rule2.preserveWS.b=true
rule2.useCodeFinder.b=false
rule2.sample=// test$0a$test // bbb$0a$
rule2.codeFinderRules.count.i=0
rule2.codeFinderRules.sample=
rule2.codeFinderRules.useAllRulesWhenTesting.b=false
rule3.ruleName=String
rule3.ruleType.i=0
rule3.expr="(.*?)"\s*=(.*?(?<!\\)(?:\\{2})*");
rule3.groupSource.i=2
rule3.groupTarget.i=-1
rule3.groupName.i=1
rule3.groupNote.i=-1
rule3.preserveWS.b=true
rule3.useCodeFinder.b=true
rule3.sample=/* Menu item to make the current document plain text */$0a$"Make Plain Text" = "Make Plain \"Text";$0a$/* Menu item to make the current document rich text */$0a$"Make Rich Text" = "Make Rich Text";$0a$
rule3.codeFinderRules.count.i=3
rule3.codeFinderRules.rule0=%(([-0+#]?)[-0+#]?)((\d\$)?)(([\d\*]*)(\.[\d\*]*)?)[dioxXucsfeEgGpn@]
rule3.codeFinderRules.rule1=(\\r\\n)|\\a|\\b|\\f|\\n|\\r|\\t|\\v
rule3.codeFinderRules.rule2=\<(/?)\w+[^>]*?>
rule3.codeFinderRules.sample=
rule3.codeFinderRules.useAllRulesWhenTesting.b=false

parameters.rule0.sample: /* Menu item to make the current document plain text */$0a$"Make Plain Text" = "Make Plain \"Text";$0a$/* Menu item to make the current document rich text */$0a$"Make Rich Text" = "Make Rich Text";$0a$
parameters.rule3.sample: /* Menu item to make the current document plain text */$0a$"Make Plain Text" = "Make Plain \"Text";$0a$/* Menu item to make the current document rich text */$0a$"Make Rich Text" = "Make Rich Text";$0a$

extractOuterStrings.description: Extract strings outside the main content structure

enabled.description: Enable pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, tags, etc.)

rules.description: Regex patterns to identify inline codes in translatable text

mergeAdjacent.description: Merge consecutive inline codes into a single placeholder

moveBoundaryCodes.description: Move inline codes at segment boundaries to the skeleton (non-translatable)

simplifierRules.description: Rules for simplifying inline code representation

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns for inline code detection

rules.description: List of regex patterns to detect inline codes

pattern.description: Regex pattern for inline code detection

sample.description: Sample text to test patterns against

useAllRulesWhenTesting.description: Test all rules together or individually

simplifierRules.description: Rules for simplifying inline code representation
